controls.purpose: deny requests from a suspended registered agent
controls.applicability: the authenticated workload maps to a registered agent
controls.canonicalKey: lowercase tenant plus NUL plus registered agent name
controls.ordering: the committed Identity lifecycle transition precedes projection
controls.expiry: only an explicit committed unsuspend removes the control
controls.recovery: replace agent.* projection keys from the exact suspended Identity SQLite set

controls.purpose: add registered bait names to the visible tool catalog
controls.applicability: a registered decoy has advertised=true for the tenant or wildcard scope
controls.canonicalKey: SHA-256 of tenant plus NUL plus decoy name
controls.ordering: the committed Identity decoy mutation precedes projection
controls.expiry: only an explicit committed retirement removes the catalog item
controls.recovery: replace the complete decoy projection from Identity SQLite without authorizing execution

controls.purpose: deny and contain a request naming a registered decoy
controls.applicability: the requested tool matches a tenant or wildcard decoy registration
controls.canonicalKey: SHA-256 of tenant plus NUL plus decoy name
controls.ordering: the committed Identity decoy mutation precedes projection
controls.expiry: only an explicit committed retirement removes enforcement
controls.recovery: replace the complete decoy projection from Identity SQLite

controls.purpose: route every request from the contained agent to human review
controls.applicability: an exact unexpired force-HIL flag exists for the registered agent
controls.canonicalKey: lowercase tenant plus NUL plus registered agent name
controls.ordering: strictly increasing mutation_version per key; replication never extends expires_at
controls.expiry: the authoritative expires_at instant or a higher-version explicit clear
controls.recovery: replace force_hil.* keys from exact unexpired and uncleared Identity SQLite rows

controls.purpose: deny a delegated request after its signed maximum use count
controls.applicability: the verified delegation grant contains max_uses
controls.canonicalKey: usage plus sanitized verified grant jti
controls.ordering: JetStream revision CAS and strictly nondecreasing uses
controls.expiry: 25 hours after the retained counter mutation
controls.recovery: read the retained current JetStream KV revision; never reconstruct a smaller count

controls.purpose: deny a verified delegation grant revoked before expiry
controls.applicability: the request presents a verified grant whose jti remains unexpired
controls.ordering: the committed revoked_at mutation precedes projection
controls.expiry: the signed grant expiry permits projection cleanup but never renewed authority
controls.recovery: replace grant.* projection keys from unexpired revoked Identity SQLite rows

controls.purpose: deny tenant work at or above a configured monthly spend ceiling
controls.applicability: an authenticated operator tenant has a configured nonnegative budget
controls.canonicalKey: authenticated lowercase tenant plus UTC calendar month
controls.ordering: a complete budget and spend pair replaces one prior cache generation
controls.expiry: cache deadline or UTC month rollover, whichever occurs first
controls.recovery: refetch both retained authorities; a partial pair is never authoritative
